parameters.formDescription: Enter your job preferences to search across multiple job boards

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json._jobRole, location: $json._country, maxItems: 30, publishedAt: 'r86400', sort: 'date' }) }}

parameters.content:
### User Inputs & Trigger
- **Form Trigger**: Collects user job search preferences:
  1. **Job Role** (e.g. *Software Engineer*)
  2. **Tech Stack** (e.g. *React, Node.js*)
  3. **Country** (Dropdown selection)
- **Store Form Input**: Saves these values to variables (`_jobRole`, `_techStack`, `_country`) for downstream APIs.

### Parallel Job Scrapers
Fetches job listings from 5 sources:
- **Remotive** (Free API, Remote)
- **Arbeitnow** (Free API, Germany/Europe)
- **Jobicy** (Free API, Remote Focus)
- **Apify LinkedIn** (Paid Scraper, Country-specific)
- **Apify Naukri** (Paid Scraper, India/Global)

### Data Consolidation (Merge Chain)
- Sequentially appends arrays from all 5 scraper nodes.
- Ensures all job listings are merged into a single downstream stream before normalization and scoring.

### Normalize, Score & Sort
Runs custom JavaScript to:
- **Normalize**: Parse fields like salary, visa support, company size across all API schemas.
- **Score Relevance**: Rank matching based on user-requested role and tech stack (using synonym expansion).
- **Filter**: Drop highly irrelevant jobs.
- **Sort**: Order by highest relevance and post date.

### Google Sheets Output
- Enter your Google Sheet ID .

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/<your google sheet ID>/edit?gid=0#gid=0

## Pre requisites

This is a simple way to get job details for the job listings directly in your spreadsheet

- go to Apify and create a free account .
-  link - https://console.apify.com/
- to get your api key go to - https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations

- approve the naukri actor to work using this link-https://console.apify.com/actors/GLb4E7UrStD7XLJxO?approvePermissions=true

## Configure this two nodes

- replace the URL to link -

linkedin -  https://api.apify.com/v2/acts/hMvNSpz3JnHgl5jkh/run-sync-get-dataset-items?token=<Your API key>&timeout=120

naukri - https://api.apify.com/v2/acts/codemaverick~naukri-job-scraper-latest/run-sync-get-dataset-items?token=<your API key>&timeout=120
